zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas de Beauchamp 11th Earl of Warwick於1313年2月14日出生在英國瓦維其可爾沃里克沃里克 卡素時，他的父親Guy de Beauchamp 10th Earl of Warwick41歲，母親Alice de Tosny28歲。他於1325年2月22日與Katherine Mortimer在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和10個女兒的父母。他於1330年登記服兵役。他於1344年被列為chamberlain of the exchequer。他去世於1369年11月13日在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯阿托斯享年56歲，埋葬在英國瓦維其可爾沃里克。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas de Beauchamp 11th Earl of Warwick于1313年2月14日出生在英国瓦維其可爾沃里克沃里克 卡素时，他的父亲Guy de Beauchamp 10th Earl of Warwick41岁，母亲Alice de Tosny28岁。他于1325年2月22日与Katherine Mortimer在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和10个女儿的父母。他于1330年登记服兵役。他于1344年被列为chamberlain of the exchequer。他去世于1369年11月13日在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯阿托斯享年56岁，埋葬在英国瓦維其可爾沃里克。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Beauchamp
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Antoine, Jacques, Yves, Andre, Armand, Emile, Fernand, Marcel, Marthe, Remi, Alcide, Camille.

English (of Norman origin) and French: habitational name from any of several places in France, for example in Manche and Somme, that are named with Old French beu, bel ‘fair, lovely’ + champ(s) ‘field, plain’ (from Latin bello campo ‘beautiful field’). In English the surname is generally pronounced Beecham . Compare Bushaw .
English: in some cases, an Anglo-Norman French adaptation of Scottish Campbell , by translation into French of the folk etymology de campo bello ‘from the fair field’.

variants.name: Beecham
meanings: English (Lincolnshire): variant of   Beauchamp  , reflecting the normal English pronunciation.

variants.name: Beachem
meanings: English (Somerset and Gloucestershire): variant of   Beauchamp  .

variants.name: Beachum
meanings: Altered form of English   Beauchamp  .

variants.name: Bagent
meanings: English:
possibly a colloquial pronunciation of Beauchamp or Beecham . Old French Beau- often appears as Be(e)- in English surnames. The -ch- has been voiced and excrescent -t has been added.

perhaps an Anglicized form of a French or Flemish surname such as Beaujean and Bejean, from Old French bel Jehan ‘handsome John’ + excrescent -t. It could have been introduced to England in the 15th or 16th century by Flemish migrants.

variants.name: Beacham
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Beauchamp  .

variants.name: Campbell
meanings: Scottish: nickname from Gaelic cam ‘crooked, bent’ + beul ‘mouth’. As a result of folk etymology, the surname was often represented in Latin documents as de bello campo ‘of the fair field’, which led to the name sometimes being ‘translated’ into Anglo-Norman French as Beauchamp .
Irish (North Armagh): adopted for Gaelic Mac Cathmhaoil ‘son of Cathmhaol’ (literally ‘battle chief’): see Caulfield and Cowell .
English: variant of   Camel  , under the influence of the Scottish name (see 1 above).

variants.name: Bushaw
meanings: Americanized form of French   Beauchamp   and   Bouchard  .

variants.name: Beacom
meanings: English (Somerset) and Irish (Fermanagh): of Norman origin, a variant of   Beauchamp  .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas de Beauchamp 11th Earl of Warwick was born on 14 February 1313, in Warwick Castle, Warwick, Warwickshire, England, his father, Guy de Beauchamp 10th Earl of Warwick, was 41 and his mother, Alice de Tosny, was 28. He married Katherine Mortimer on 22 February 1325, in Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 10 daughters. He registered for military service in 1330. In 1344, at the age of 31, his occupation is listed as chamberlain of the exchequer. He died on 13 November 1369, in Artois, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, at the age of 56, and was buried in Warwick, Warwickshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas de Beauchamp 11th Earl of Warwick est né le 14 février 1313, à Warwick Castle, Warwick, Warwickshire, Angleterre, son père, Guy de Beauchamp 10th Earl of Warwick, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Alice de Tosny, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Katherine Mortimer le 22 février 1325, à Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 10 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1330. En 1344, à l’âge de 31 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est chamberlain of the exchequer. Il est décédé le 13 novembre 1369, à Artois, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterré à Warwick, Warwickshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas de Beauchamp 11th Earl of Warwick am 14. Februar 1313 in Warwick Castle, Warwick, Warwickshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Guy de Beauchamp 10th Earl of Warwick 41 und seine Mutter Alice de Tosny 28. Er hat am 22. Februar 1325 in Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom Katherine Mortimer geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 10 Töchter. Er hat sich 1330 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. 1344, als er 31 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als chamberlain of the exchequer aufgeführt. Er starb am 13. November 1369 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Artois, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich und wurde in Warwick, Warwickshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas de Beauchamp 11th Earl of Warwick è nato il il 14 febbraio 1313 nel Warwick Castle, Warwick, Warwickshire, England, il suo padre, Guy de Beauchamp 10th Earl of Warwick, aveva 41 anni e il suo madre, Alice de Tosny, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Katherine Mortimer il 22 febbraio 1325, nel Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 10 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1330. Nel 1344, all'età di 31 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come chamberlain of the exchequer. Morì il 13 novembre 1369, nel Artois, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, all'età di 56 anni, e fu sepolto a Warwick, Warwickshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas de Beauchamp 11th Earl of Warwickが1313年2月14日にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアワーウィックワーウィック カストルで生まれた時，父Guy de Beauchamp 10th Earl of Warwickは41歳，母Alice de Tosnyは28歳であった。1325年2月22日にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアでKatherine Mortimerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と10人の娘の親であった。彼は1330年に兵役登録をした。1344年，31歳の時，職業はchamberlain of the exchequerと記録されている。彼は1369年11月13日にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスプアス-デ-カレイスアルトイスで56歳で死去し，イギリスワーウィクシュアイアワーウィックにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas de Beauchamp 11th Earl of Warwick(이)가 1313년 2월 14일 영국 워윅실르 워윅 워윅 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Guy de Beauchamp 10th Earl of Warwick(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice de Tosny(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1325년 2월 22일 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르에서 Katherine Mortimer(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 열 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1330년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 1344년, 31세의 나이로 그의 직업은 chamberlain of the exchequer이었다. 그는 1369년 11월 13일 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 파스-데-캘레이 아토이스에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 워윅실르 워윅에 묻혔다.

pt.14 February 1313–13 November 1369: 14 de fevereiro de 1313–13 de novembro de 1369
pt.Warwick Castle, Warwick, Warwickshire, E: Warwick Castle, Warwick, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.Vendôme 1er Canton, Vendôme, Loir-et-Che: Vendôme 1er Canton, Vendôme, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, França
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas de Beauchamp 11th Earl of Warwick nasceu em 14 de fevereiro de 1313, em Warwick Castle, Warwick, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Guy de Beauchamp 10th Earl of Warwick, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Alice de Tosny, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Katherine Mortimer em 22 de fevereiro de 1325, em Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 10 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1330. Em 1344, com 31 anos, sua profissão aparece como chamberlain of the exchequer. Ele faleceu em 13 de novembro de 1369, em Artois, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, com 56 anos, e foi sepultado em Warwick, Warwickshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas de Beauchamp 11th Earl of Warwick родился 14 февраля 1313 г. в местности варвикк кастл, варвикк, варвиккшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Guy de Beauchamp 10th Earl of Warwick было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Alice de Tosny, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Katherine Mortimer 22 февраля 1325 г. в местности варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 10 дочерей. В 1330 году он поступил на военную службу. В 1344 году, в возрасте 31 год, работал по профессии chamberlain of the exchequer. Он умер 13 ноября 1369 г. в местности артоис, пас-де-калеи, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция в возрасте 56 лет и был похоронен в местности варвикк, варвиккшир, Англия.

es.Vendôme 1er Canton, Vendôme, Loir-et-Che: Vendôme 1er Canton, Vendôme, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, Francia
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Thomas de Beauchamp 11th Earl of Warwick nació el 14 de febrero de 1313, en Warwick Castle, Warwick, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Guy de Beauchamp 10th Earl of Warwick, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Alice de Tosny, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Katherine Mortimer el 22 de febrero de 1325, en Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 10 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1330. En 1344, a la edad de 31 años, su ocupación registrada era chamberlain of the exchequer. Murió el 13 de noviembre de 1369, en Artois, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, a la edad de 56 años, y fue sepultado en Warwick, Warwickshire, Inglaterra.
